a.question: How many layers are passed during a single measurement?
a.answer: a	Six layers are passed through.

a.question: What is the biggest difference between the different concentrations of lithium?
a.answer: a	The films look quite alike, meaning there crystal structure is roughly the same, however the 200 cLi-MnO2 sample seems to have a defect around 47 °20.

b.question: Which sample shows the most prominent lithiated phase?
b.answer: b	The 300cLi-MnO2 sample shows the most prominent lithiated phase.

b.question: Is there a minimum amount of lithium cycles required to overcome the MnO2 crystal phases?
b.answer: b	The MnO2(200) peak is still visible for 100 lithium cycles, whereas 200 lithium cycles do not show this peak anymore indicating that there is a minimum.
